summary.lv: Grafton Latvia klients (strauji augošs SaaS uzņēmums) meklē Technical Consultant, kas konfigurēs un atbalstīs SaaS risinājumu klientiem un piedalīsies ieviešanas projektos.
summary.en: A Grafton Latvia client (a fast-growing SaaS company) is hiring a Technical Consultant to configure and support the SaaS product for customers and contribute to implementation projects.
